title: Roasted Rich Japanese Shrimp Bake
description: A winey, shaggy, date-night Japanese dish from the Kanto region featuring butter, bake, and high-protein ingredients.
instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together soy sauce, sake, and sugar.
Add the shrimp to the marinade and toss to coat.
Let the shrimp marinate for at least 15 minutes, or up to 30 minutes in the refrigerator.
Line a baking sheet with parchment paper and arrange the shrimp in a single layer.
Drizzle the softened butter over the shrimp and sprinkle with sesame seeds and chopped green onions.
Bake the shrimp for 8-10 minutes, or until they are pink and cooked through.
Remove the shrimp from the oven and sprinkle with chopped scallions and toasted sesame seeds.
Serve the shrimp hot, garnished with additional green onions and sesame seeds if desired.
